description: Letter from an unidentified person connected to Ibn ʿAwkal, ca. 1030. The letter is illegible in many places. Discusses the will of one of the partners. The people involved may have been from Syracuse. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, p. 601.)
description_he: מכתב מאדם קשור לאבן עוקאל, כ-1030, על צוואת אחד השותפים, קשה לפענוח
